name: commercial-lease
title: Commercial Lease Agreement
description: Commercial property lease agreement for business tenants

landlordName.label: Landlord/Property Owner
landlordName.description: Legal name of the property owner or management company

businessName.label: Business Name
businessName.description: Legal name of the tenant business entity

contactName.label: Primary Contact
contactName.description: Name of the primary business contact

permittedUse.label: Permitted Use
permittedUse.description: Description of the permitted business use of the premises

monthlyBaseRent.label: Monthly Base Rent
monthlyBaseRent.description: Base monthly rent amount in USD

camCharges.label: CAM Charges
camCharges.description: Common Area Maintenance charges per month

renewalOption.label: Renewal Option
renewalOption.description: Whether tenant has option to renew

tenantImprovements.label: Tenant Improvements Allowed
tenantImprovements.description: Whether tenant may make improvements to the space
